## Method

{{ method_overview | default("[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add a clear explanation of what the method, process, or analytical approach is._]") }}

---

## When to use this

{{ when_to_use | default("[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Describe the specific situations or conditions where this method is appropriate._]") }}

---

## Steps

{{ steps | default("[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Provide a step-by-step breakdown of how to apply the method correctly._]") }}

---

## Example

{{ example | default("[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Provide a short illustrative example of the method in use._]") }}

---

## Limitations and considerations

{{ limitations | default("[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Detail any key limitations, assumptions, or risks associated with this approach._]") }}

---
